title: Account-level Search Option settings on boards
excerpt: Being able to set the ‘Search Options’ on a board on account level, so it applies to all users, similar to how it can be done with views, would be greatly appreciated as it is sometimes too complex for some users to make…

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to set the ‘Search Options’ on a board on account level, so it applies to all users, similar to how it can be done with views, would be greatly appreciated as it is sometimes too complex for some users to make this change individually.
